# 宣传素材清单

| 素材 | 路径 | 用途 |
|------|------|------|
| README 首屏 | README.md | 仓库首页截图、X 发帖配图 |
| 架构图代码块 | README.md 或 docs/architecture.md | 中文社区发帖说明图 |
| Quick Start 片段 | README.md | 展示“可以开始尝试” |
| Workflow demo | examples/workflows/demo-workflow.json | 展示多运行时链路 |
| Manifest demo | examples/manifests/demo-skill-manifest.json | 展示 schema 设计 |
| Permission demo | examples/permissions/demo-permission-rule.json | 展示安全边界 |
| Task demo | examples/tasks/demo-task.json | 展示任务结构 |
